Integrations

      
    

    

      
Loading...

    

  

  

    

      
Communication

      Connect messaging channels so your agent can send and receive messages
    

    

      

        

          

            
          

          

            Telegram
            Connect a Telegram bot to chat with your agent from anywhere
          

          
        

        

          

            
            
            Get one from @BotFather on Telegram
          

          

            
            
            Comma-separated usernames. Use * to allow everyone. Empty = block all.
          

        

        

          

            
            

              
              
            

            Comma-separated usernames. Use * to allow everyone. Empty = block all.
          

        

        

          
        

      


      
      

        

          

            
          

          

            WhatsApp
            Send messages to yourself on WhatsApp and get agent responses
          

          
        

        

          

            
            Scan with WhatsApp → Settings → Linked Devices
          

        

        

          
          
        

      


      
      

        

          

            
          

          

            Phone Number
            Receive SMS via Twilio webhook — set this URL in your Twilio phone number config
          

        

        

          

            
            
          

          
            Paste this URL in Twilio → Phone Numbers → your number → Messaging → "A message comes in" webhook
          
        

      

    

  

  

    

      
      

    

    

      

        

          
          
        

        

          
          
        

        
        
      

      

        

          
Click a skill from the panel to add steps

        

      

      

        

          
Saved Flows

          
        

        

      

    

  

  

    

      

        

          

            
            
          

          

            
            

              
              
            

          

        

        

          
          

            
            
          

          
Standard 5-field cron: min hour day month weekday

        

        

          
          
          
Job will run once at this time and then auto-disable

          Saving...
        

        
Saves to .env and agent.yaml in your agent directory. Changes take effect on the next query.
